findings.location: s1 — 一括更新処理における更新チェック（主キーが組み合わせキーの場合）/ updateVersionWithCheck loop
findings.description: The knowledge file uses `UsersExclusiveControl` as the class argument in the `updateVersionWithCheck` loop, but the source code uses `ExclusiveUserCondition`. These are different class names: the source reads `new ExclusiveUserCondition(deletedUser.getUserId(), deletedUser.getPk2(), deletedUser.getPk3())`, while the knowledge file substituted `UsersExclusiveControl` instead.
`n:errors` (the JSP tag referenced in s2 for displaying optimistic lock error messages) is absent from s2 hints. The source explicitly mentions `n:errorsタグ` in the configuration section.
findings.source_evidence: Source: "n:errorsタグを使用して、画面上にエラーメッセージを表示することができる。"
